entries.title: Dr. Shamim Mohammad
entries.excerpt: Dr. Shamim received his first degree in rehabilitation sciences from the National institute of Empowerment of People with Intellectual Disabilities, Secunderbad; MA and M.Phil. degrees from the Indian Universities. He majored in Public Health from Ohio…
entries.text: Dr. Shamim Mohammad Associate Professor Department of Clinical Sciences Dr. Shamim received his first degree in rehabilitation sciences from the National institute of Empowerment of People with Intellectual Disabilities, Secunderbad; MA and M.Phil. degrees from the Indian Universities. He majored in Public Health from Ohio University under International Ford Foundation Fellowship program in 2008; his doctoral work from the Symbiosis International University, Pune in Health Sciences in 2018. He taught 7 years at Umm AL Qura University, Makkah, KSA, 1 year at OP Jindal Global University, Sonipat, Haryana, and presently teaching at MIT WPU, Pune. He has also practiced public health through various agencies government and non-government agencies for the last past 15 years. He has more than a dozen publications in his credit. Furthermore,, he is a licensed from the RCI as a rehab practitioner.

entries.title: Dr. Shantini Aniruddha Bokil
entries.excerpt: Environmental and Sustainable Engineering M.E.Construction Management
entries.text: Dr. Shantini Aniruddha Bokil HOD, Professor Department of Civil Engineering Environmental and Sustainable Engineering M.E.Construction Management Dr. Shantini Bokil is a fine professional, responsible in preparing and delivering lectures in classroom discussions. She has completed a doctorate degree in the area of “Environmental and Sustainable Engineering and has formed lesson strategies, presented creative presentation material to students, responding to students learning needs and evaluating students’ progress. She has a sound background in engineering and the ability to conduct research and feasibility studies in fields of interest; has a touch base with other engineering professionals to update on latest principles that govern the field that will enhance the learning experience of students. She has worked as Student’s Counsellor and a women grievance cell member. She delivers lectures on “Sharing Happiness” for women and “Science and Spirituality.” A great value addition to team engagements, she also has contributed greatly to the success of Aarohan, a National Level Cultural fest at MIT-WPU. As an avid educator, she is extremely passionate about guiding and facilitating the younger generation for their overall development and is driven use her cognitive assets for the sole benefit of her students.

entries.title: Dr. Sharbani Kaushik
entries.excerpt: Biomaterials, Bioenergy, Electrochemical devices, Biosensors, Microbial Electrolysis, CO2 conversion
entries.text: Dr. Sharbani Kaushik Program Director Department of Bioengineering Biomaterials, Bioenergy, Electrochemical devices, Biosensors, Microbial Electrolysis, CO2 conversion Dr. Sharbani Kaushik is a renowned biotechnology researcher with expertise in bioenergy, bioelectronics, and membrane proteins. She completed her Ph.D. in the School of Energy Science and Engineering from IIT Guwahati. Her work in renewable energy and bioanalytical applications includes pioneering research on microbial fuel cells and biofuel cell biosensing devices. As a postdoctoral researcher at The Ohio State University, USA, she made significant contributions to chemistry and biochemistry, especially in membrane proteins, synthetic biology and drug discovery, resulting in multiple high-impact publications. She has also served as an Assistant Professor at the Regional Institute of Science and Technology in Meghalaya, where she introduced new courses and mentored students in biosensors and biomedical instrumentation. Dr. Kaushik has received numerous accolades, including the Young Scientist Award from the Materials Research Society of India and the ISEES Best PhD Thesis Award from the International Society of Energy Environment and Sustainability.. Her excellent presentations and publications at international conferences reflect her ability to communicate complex scientific concepts effectively. In addition to

entries.title: Dr. Sharmishta Suhas Desai
entries.department: Department of Computer Science and Engineering
entries.excerpt: My teaching philosophy emphasizes experiential learning, research-driven education, and strong industry collaboration to prepare students for real-world challenges. I am motivated to cultivate innovation, critical thinking, and entrepreneurship among…
entries.text: Dr. Sharmishta Suhas Desai Professor Department of Computer Science and Engineering My teaching philosophy emphasizes experiential learning, research-driven education, and strong industry collaboration to prepare students for real-world challenges. I am motivated to cultivate innovation, critical thinking, and entrepreneurship among students through project-based learning and mentorship. My contributions include securing funded research grants from ICMR,AICTE etc, leading innovative projects such as drone-based plant identification and portable agribots, and mentoring a student-led startup operating nationally and internationally. Through research, industry partnerships, and innovation initiatives, I strive to support MIT World Peace University’s vision of value-based education, technological advancement, and creating socially responsible innovators.

entries.text: Dr. Shikha Vikrant Gaikwad Assistant Professor Department of Biosciences and Technology Microbial metabolites and biosurfactants, bioprocess engineering, plant–microbe interactions, biostimulants, circular economy, and environmental biotechnology. "Dr. Shikha Vikrant Gaikwad is a distinguished microbiologist and senior educationist with over 18 years of academic and research experience. She currently serves as an Assistant Professor in the Department of Biosciences and Technology, Dr. Vishwanath Karad MIT World Peace University, Pune, where she also coordinates postgraduate program of Microbiology. She has doctorate degree in Microbiology. Her expertise spans in the fields of Agriculture, Health care, Plant growth Promontory Bacteria (PGPB), Biocontrol agents, Biostimulants, Bioprocess Technology, Circular Economy, and Metabolomics, Plant–Microbe Interactions. Dr. Gaikwad has made notable contributions to microbial biosurfactants, focusing on their isolation, optimization, and sustainable applications in agriculture and bioremediation. Her research further explores bioactive microbial metabolites such as β-glucans and melanin, emphasizing their potential in drug delivery, immunotherapy, and cosmetic biotechnology. She has pioneered eco-friendly bioprocesses, including hydrodynamic cavitation-based polymer extraction and biosurfactant-assisted remediation of polluted environment

Sonawani MIT-WPU Faculty Faculty Associate Professor Bio Associate Professor in the Department of Computer Engineering and Technology, has over two decades of combined teaching and industry experience. She works in the field of Artificial Intelligence, Data Analytics, and Sustainable Technologies. Her research focuses on AI-driven solutions for environmental sustainability, including air quality prediction, climate analytics, biodiversity monitoring and forest encroachment. She actively collaborates with BAIF Development Research Foundation and Bombay Natural History Society (BNHS), contributing to initiatives aligned with the Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs). Her work integrates technology with ecological conservation and rural development, promoting data-driven approaches for sustainable agriculture, environmental monitoring, and community resilience. She has published 45+ research papers, 7 patents (national & international) and contributed as a reviewer for reputed journals and conferences. Her work has been recognized with Best Paper Awards, Hackathon wins. entries.title: Dr. Shilpa Samir Chapadgaonkar
entries.excerpt: Bioprocess and enzyme technology, biopharmaceutical production and purification, tissue engineering, disease models, and sustainable biotechnology.
entries.text: Dr. Shilpa Samir Chapadgaonkar Associate Professor and Program Director Department of Biosciences and Technology Bioprocess and enzyme technology, biopharmaceutical production and purification, tissue engineering, disease models, and sustainable biotechnology. Dr. Shilpa S. Chapadgaonkar is an experienced academician and researcher with expertise in upstream processing, bioseparation, and enzyme technology. With over 15 years of teaching experience at UG, PG, and PhD levels, she has guided four PhD candidates to completion and is currently supervising three more, along with several M.Sc. and M.Tech. projects. She is leading the Department of Biosciences and Technology at MITWPU as Program Director. She has held key roles such as MSc (Biotech) Program Coordinator, Research Cluster Head, and PhD Program Coordinator, contributing significantly to NAAC and UGC audits. Her research focuses on drug discovery, bioprocess development for biopharmaceuticals, and investigating genetic disorders like infertility and autism. Passionate about sustainability, she has developed technologies for waste valorization, enzyme formulations, and textile wastewater treatment. Dr. Chapadgaonkar’s work has been supported by grants from the Science and Engineering Research Board (SERB), and she has led industrial collaborations with global companies like BASF and Gennova Biopharmaceuticals. entries.text: Dr. Shital Pathak Professor of Practices Department of Pharmaceutical Sciences Dr. Shitak Pathak is a seasoned pharmaceutical professional with over 28 years of illustrious career in industry. Dr. Shital has expertise in Analytical Research, in vitro bio equivalence, quality and compliance. Currently he is working as senior vice president & head of Analytical Research and in vitro bio study lab at Glenmark Pharmaceutical Ltd. He has worked with major Pharma companies like Ranbaxy, Wockhardt, Sandoz and Apotex. His industry experience is across the globe e.g. US, Canada, Europe, and Latin America. He has experience in all dosage forms like oral solids, liquids, topical dosages, injections, and respiratory products. Has an in depth understanding of regulatory science and different markets.

entries.title: Dr. Shital Vasant Kahane
entries.excerpt: Metal–semiconductor quantum dots and nanomaterials for optoelectronic, energy-storage, and biological applications.
entries.text: Dr. Shital Vasant Kahane Assistant Professor Department of Physics Metal–semiconductor quantum dots and nanomaterials for optoelectronic, energy-storage, and biological applications. Dr. Shital Kahane, a Ph.D. holder in Physics with a focus on nanomaterials from Pune University, has been teaching for 5 years and currently holds the position of Assistant Professor at the Department of Physics in MIT-WPU, Kothrud, Pune. Her recent studies have been centered around the synthesis of metal-semiconductor quantum dots/nanomaterials, with applications ranging from liquid crystal displays, supercapacitors, to biological applications.

entries.title: Dr. Shivprakash Bhagwatrao Barve
entries.excerpt: Material Characterization, Advanced Manufacturing Processes
entries.text: Dr. Shivprakash Bhagwatrao Barve Professor Department of Mechanical Engineering Material Characterization, Advanced Manufacturing Processes Dr. Shivprakash B. Barve is a Mechanical Engineering Ph.D. holder from Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj University, Kolhapur. He completed his post-graduation in Mechanical Engineering from the Government College of Engineering Karad and graduation in Mechanical Engineering from Jawaharlal Nehru Engineering College Aurangabad with distinction. With areas of specialization in Materials, Composites, Nanocomposites, Manufacturing System, Renewable Energy Technologies, Power Generation, Waste Heat Recovery, Emission, Operations Research, Research Methodology, Applied Thermodynamics, Project Management, and Operations Research, he possesses exceptional skills and expertise. He has been honored with the MIT Ideal Teacher Award in September 2017 and elected as a Member of the Committee of the Institution of Engineers (India), Pune Local Center for the period of August 2021-July 2023. Dr. Barve has also served as a Member of the Board of Studies (BOS) for Mechanical Engineering at Dr. Vishwanath Karad MIT World Peace University, Pune (2019-2021) and recognized as a PG Teacher and Ph.D. Guide in Mechanical Engineering by the same institution in 2017

Sugave Dr. Shounak Rushikesh Sugave is an Associate Professor in the School of Computer Engineering and Technology at Dr. Vishwanath Karad MIT World Peace University… MIT-WPU / Faculty / Dr. Shounak R. Sugave Faculty Dr. Shounak R. Sugave MIT-WPU Faculty Faculty Associate Professor Bio Dr. Shounak Rushikesh Sugave is an Associate Professor in the School of Computer Engineering and Technology at Dr. Vishwanath Karad MIT World Peace University (MIT-WPU), Pune, India. He has over 17 years of experience in academics and industry. Dr. Sugave completed his B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering from Dr. Babasaheb Ambedkar Marathwada University, Aurangabad, India in 2003. He later earned his M.Tech in Network and Internet Engineering from Sri Jayachamarajendra College of Engineering (SJCE), Mysore, under Visvesvaraya Technological University (VTU) in 2005. He obtained his Ph.D. in Software Testing from Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University (JNTU), Anantapur, Andhra Pradesh, India. He has published several research papers in reputed journals and conference proceedings. His research and academic interests include Software Engineering, Software Testing, and Computer Networks. Dr. Sugave is actively involved in teaching, research supervision, curriculum development, and mentoring undergraduate and postgraduate students, contributing to the promotion of industry-relevant skills and research-driven learning. Specialisation: Computer Science and Engineering Areas of Expertise: Software Engineering, Software Testing and Computer Network Teaching Experience : 15 Years Industry/Research Experience: 5 Years Dr. Shounak R. entries.text: Dr. Shraddha Kulkarni Assistant Professor Department of Bioengineering Dr. Shraddha Kulkarni is a passionate academician with a wealth of 17 years of experience in engineering teaching and research in Biotechnology. Her experience includes teaching interdisciplinary and application oriented courses like Fermentation Technology, Bioprocess Engineering, Biothermodynamics, Bioseparation Engineering, Bioreaction Engineering etc. She has always emphasized on experiential learning with hands-on training of the students to make them industry ready. she has worked for development of syllabus for B.Tech Biotechnology, NAAC and NBA accreditation of the programs, development of laboratory courses etc. Beyond the classroom, Dr. Kulkarni is deeply engaged in cutting-edge research endeavors. She has completed her Ph.D from Department of Technology, SPPU Pune. Her areas of expertise span across diverse domains within Bioengineering, encompassing fermentation technology, Bioprocess Design, proteomic technology, computational studies of biomolecules. Through her research, she endeavors to address the development of environmentally friendly surfactant products and their application in various fields. Committed to the advancement of her field, Dr. Kulkarni is an author, with numerous publications in esteemed journals and conferences. She has fetched research grants from agencies like Savitribai P

entries.text: Dr. Shraddha Subhash Kokane Assistant Professor Department of Business Dr. Shraddha Kokane is a reader and writer in domain of banking and finance for over 15 years. She was a Program Head for MBA Banking in MIT WPU from 2018 to 2022 and was instrumental in designing the curriculum. In 2022 she was granted the RBI Faculty Scholarship in 2022 and in 2024 she was awarded an ICSSR-funded research. Her case studies are published with the Case Centre. Shraddha’s papers are indexed by Scopus and Web of Science. She can be reached out for collaboration on banking, finance, governance, and markets.

entries.title: Dr. Shreya Bera
entries.excerpt: Dr. Shreya Bera is an Assistant Professor of English at Dr. Vishwanath Karad MIT World Peace University. She completed her PhD in Literary Studies from the University of Szeged in January 2023 under the prestigious Stipendium Hungaricum Scholarship…
entries.text: Dr. Shreya Bera Assistant Professor Department of Liberal Arts Dr. Shreya Bera is an Assistant Professor of English at Dr. Vishwanath Karad MIT World Peace University. She completed her PhD in Literary Studies from the University of Szeged in January 2023 under the prestigious Stipendium Hungaricum Scholarship Programme (2018-2023). She attended multiple international conferences such as the 14th Biennial Conference of the Hungarian Society for the Study of English (HUSSE) in Hungary (2019), 11th Brno International Conference, Czech Republic, ESSE Doctoral Symposium in France (2020), Narratives and Self Ambivalence symposium, SAS, London in 2021 and more. She also co-edited a book titled Critical Essays on Multicultural India: Exploring Inclusiveness and New Humanities published in 2017. She has also authored articles and book reviews in peer-reviewed, and Scopus indexed journals such as Americana e-journal, British and American studies (B.A.S.) journal, The ESSE Messenger etc. She is an established author of two books published in the years of 2017 and 2025.

entries.title: Dr. Shubhangi Rastogi
entries.excerpt: Bioethanol, Biocatalyst, lignocellulosic residues, probiotics, and yogurts.
entries.text: Dr. Shubhangi Rastogi Assistant Professor Department of Bioengineering Bioethanol, Biocatalyst, lignocellulosic residues, probiotics, and yogurts. Dr. Shubhangi Rastogi is an experienced academician and researcher with a background in Microbiology and Industrial Biotechnology. She holds a Master of Science in Biotechnology and a Ph. D. in Microbiology from Panjab University, Chandigarh. With over 2 years of industrial and 1.5 years of research experience, her expertise is in bioprocess: biocatalyst, microbial cultures, 2-G bio-ethanol production, probiotic development, and in-vitro drug development. She teaches bioprocess engineering and industrial biotechnology at the undergraduate level. Dr. Rastogi has been awarded with a DBT-BIRAC E-YUVA scale-up project on bioethanol production in 2022. Dr. Rastogi’s previous research focused on the scale-up of biocatalyst cocktail production and utilization in the biological pretreatment of lignocellulosic residues for bioethanol production. Her present research interests include the scale-up of biocatalysts, specifically ligno-hemicellulases, biological pretreatment of lignocelluloses with a major focus on rice straw, bioethanol production, and development of probiotics and yogurts for exploring gut gut-brain axis.

entries.title: Dr. Shvetank Bhatt
entries.excerpt: Neuropharmacology, CNS dis, Pharmacokinetics and Toxicology
entries.text: Dr. Shvetank Bhatt Associate Professor Department of Pharmaceutical Sciences Neuropharmacology, CNS dis, Pharmacokinetics and Toxicology Dr. Shvetank Bhatt is an Associate Professor at the School of Science and Technology, MIT World Peace University (MIT-WPU), with over 15 years of experience in teaching and research and 4 years of industry experience. He has previously served at BITS Pilani (Pilani Campus), Ramaiah University of Applied Sciences, Bengaluru, and Amity University Madhya Pradesh, Gwalior, and has worked in industries including Ranbaxy Research Laboratories, Gurugram, Microtherapeutic Research Labs, Chennai, and Smart Analyst India Pvt. Ltd., Gurugram. He completed his B.Pharm from the University of Rajasthan, Jaipur, M.Pharm in Pharmacology from the Manipal Academy of Higher Education (MAHE), Manipal, and Ph.D. in Pharmaceutical Sciences from BITS Pilani, Pilani Campus, Rajasthan. His research focuses on neuropharmacology, particularly depression, anxiety, Alzheimer’s disease, and other CNS disorders. Dr. Bhatt has authored over 100 research publications, 7 books, and 40 book chapters, and has completed one UGC-funded project and five industry-sponsored projects. He holds two Indian patents and one Australian patent. His research impact includes 2,829 citations, an h-index of 24, and an i10-index of 54. He is listed among the Top 2% Scientists globally (Stanford–

entries.excerpt: Dr. Shweta Shirolkar is an Assistant Professor at Dr. Vishwanath Karad MIT World Peace University, Pune. She holds a Ph.D. in Management from Symbiosis International (Deemed University), Pune, with a research focus on Information Systems Adoption and…
entries.text: Dr. Shweta Devendra Shirolkar Assistant Professor Department of Business Dr. Shweta Shirolkar is an Assistant Professor at Dr. Vishwanath Karad MIT World Peace University, Pune. She holds a Ph.D. in Management from Symbiosis International (Deemed University), Pune, with a research focus on Information Systems Adoption and Usage. Her research interests span technology adoption and usage, the sharing economy, collaborative consumption, and technology in education management. She also specializes in Marketing Management, Marketing Research, Business Research, and Research Methodology. Dr. Shirolkar brings over 16 years of professional experience, including 4.5 years in the commercial research industry and 12 years in academia. She has actively contributed to academic discourse through paper presentations at various national and international conferences. Her scholarly work includes publications in Scopus-indexed, ABDC-listed, and UGC-CARE- approved journals. She has also contributed research papers to journals bearing both ISBN and ISSN identifiers. Additionally, she has authored a case study featured in the European Case Centre and ET Cases. She holds two published patents registered with the Government of India. and has also contributed a research paper to a journal bearing both ISBN and ISSN identifiers. entries.excerpt: Wireless Communication / IoT
entries.text: Dr. Shweta Yogesh Kukade Assistant Professor Department of Electrical and Electronics Engineering Wireless Communication / IoT Dr. Shweta Kukade is a highly accomplished academician who has achieved numerous milestones in the field of Electronics and Communication Engineering. With over 14 years of experience in teaching and research, she is a highly respected figure in the academic community. In 2022, she received her Ph.D. degree from Pune University, Pune, India, which was the culmination of years of hard work and dedication. As an Assistant Professor at the School of Electronics and Communication Engineering, MITWPU, Pune, India, Dr. Kukade is able to combine her passion for teaching with her love for research. Her research interests are varied and include electronics circuits, mobile communication, Internet of Things, physical layer design, and resource allocation in wireless communication. She has published numerous research papers in prestigious international journals and has presented her work at various national and international conferences. Dr. Kukade is known for her innovative and insightful approach to teaching and research. Her students benefit greatly from her extensive experience and her ability to connect complex concepts to real-world applications. His core strengths are curriculum development, capacity building, team management, and relationship management. He has a Ph. D. in Management from the University of Pune preceded by an MBA (Marketing Management). He has also completed Post Graduate Certificate Programme in Market Research and Data Analytics from MICA (formerly known as Mudra Institute of Communications), Ahmedabad. He is a researcher and MS Excel trainer. He has 10 Scopus/ABDC/Referred research publications. His areas of expertise include consumer behaviour, e-commerce management, digital marketing, customer relationship management, business analytics, and retail management.

entries.text: Dr. Siraj Ahmed Bhatkar Program Director Department of Petroleum Engineering Enhanced Oil Recovery (EOR),Artificial Lift Systems, Petroleum Produced Water Treatment, Drilling and Well Design Dr. Siraj Ahmed Bhatkar is a prominent figure in the field of Petroleum Engineering, currently serving as the Program Director at the Department of Petroleum Engineering at Dr. Vishwanath Karad MIT World Peace University (MIT WPU), Pune. With over 15 years of experience in academia and research, Dr. Bhatkar has made significant contributions to the advancement of petroleum engineering education and practices. Ph.D. from Savitribai Phule Pune University (SPPU). Dr. Bhatkar holds a Ph.D. in Petroleum Engineering from Savitribai Phule Pune University, complemented by a Master of Engineering in Petroleum Engineering from Maharashtra Institute of Technology and a Bachelor of Engineering in Chemical Engineering from Vishwakarma Institute of Technology. His specialization encompasses Enhanced Oil Recovery (EOR), drilling engineering, artificial lift systems, and produced water management. Since joining MIT WPU in 2010, Dr. Bhatkar has been instrumental in curriculum development and student placements, successfully coordinating opportunities for over 250 students. entries.title: Dr. Soubir Das
entries.excerpt: Dr. Soubir Das holds a Ph.D. in Petroleum Engineering from IIT (ISM) Dhanbad, specializing in the development of clay-free drilling fluid systems for gas hydrate-bearing formations. His research focused on formulating low-dosage hydrate inhibitors (LDHIs)…
entries.text: Dr. Soubir Das Assistant Professor Department of Petroleum Engineering Dr. Soubir Das holds a Ph.D. in Petroleum Engineering from IIT (ISM) Dhanbad, specializing in the development of clay-free drilling fluid systems for gas hydrate-bearing formations. His research focused on formulating low-dosage hydrate inhibitors (LDHIs) for water-based, non-damaging polymeric drilling fluids, ensuring enhanced performance and minimal reservoir damage. With expertise in drilling technology, drilling fluids, and LDHI synthesis, Dr. Das has extensive experience with advanced analytical instruments such as FT-IR, TGA-DTA-DSC, Particle Size Analyzer, Zeta Potential Analyzer, and high- pressure dynamic flow-loop systems (up to 10,000 psi). He holds an MTech. Petroleum Engineering and B.E. Petroleum and Offshore Engineering from IIT(ISM) Dhanbad and AMET University Chennai as well. He has collaborated with the Gas Hydrate Research & Technology Centre (GHRTC), ONGC, Panvel, Navi Mumbai applying theoretical insights to industry challenges during his Ph.D. Dr. Das has authored multiple SCI-indexed journal publications and presented at national and international conferences. He is skilled in both independent research and multidisciplinary teamwork, contributing to advancements in petroleum engineering. Ph.D. from Indian Institute of Technology (IIT), ISM Dhanbad. She has been instrumental in translating scientific innovations into impactful health programs and policies. Jha is a Professor of Entrepreneurship at the Indian Institute of Management Bangalore (IIMB) and Chairperson of NSRCEL, the Institute’s acclaimed startup incubator. Her research interests lie at the intersection of innovation and entrepreneurship in emerging country contexts, with a particular focus on corporate entrepreneurship, social entrepreneurship and hybrid organising. She joined IIMB in December 2015, bringing with her a unique combination of rigorous academic training as well as distinguished industry experience. Before her move to academia, Dr. Jha held senior managerial roles at globally recognised technology companies such as Microsoft, Sun Microsystems, and Infosys, giving her a strong industry orientation that enriches her teaching and research. She also worked as a researcher with the McGill Centre for the Convergence of Health and Economics. At IIMB, Dr. Jha teaches courses including Entrepreneurial Mindset and Action (MBA), Contemporary Entrepreneurship (doctoral programme), Strategic Partnerships, New Age Business Models, and Entrepreneuri

entries.title: Dr. Suchitra Renguntwar
entries.excerpt: Dr. Suchitra Renguntwar (Ajgaonkar) is an Assistant Professor of Psychology in the Department of Liberal Arts at MIT WPU, teaching industrial psychology, psychological assessment in HRD and counselling, and health psychology. She holds a Ph.D. in…
entries.text: Dr. Suchitra Renguntwar Assistant Professor Department of Liberal Arts Dr. Suchitra Renguntwar (Ajgaonkar) is an Assistant Professor of Psychology in the Department of Liberal Arts at MIT WPU, teaching industrial psychology, psychological assessment in HRD and counselling, and health psychology. She holds a Ph.D. in management and a master’s degree in psychology and is qualified for UGC NET and SET in psychology. She has over six years of experience teaching MBA students and eight years of industry experience. Her empirical research focuses on workforce agility in the information technology industry, learning mechanisms and TQM in the manufacturing industry, and resilience and women empowerment in social enterprises. Her research papers are published in ABDC (B) category journals – International Journal of Organizational Analysis and TQM Journal. Her research interests include socio-cognitive elements in psychology, nudge theory, and collaborative research on the application of psychology to management. She has expertise in mixed-method research, systematic literature review, and qualitative research methods.

entries.title: Dr. Sudeepta Banerjee
entries.excerpt: With over 19 years of diverse experience in higher education, Dr. Sudeep¬ta Banerjee brings together academic excellence, people leadership, and international engagement. As a senior faculty member at MIT World Peace University, she has successfully headed…
entries.text: Dr. Sudeepta Banerjee Assistant Professor Department of Business With over 19 years of diverse experience in higher education, Dr. Sudeep¬ta Banerjee brings together academic excellence, people leadership, and international engagement. As a senior faculty member at MIT World Peace University, she has successfully headed programs like MCA and BBA (Business Analytics), led international MOUs with globally ranked universities, and played a key role in achieving NAAC 'A' grade accreditation. Her work spans across teaching, institutional branding, strategic partnerships, and curriculum design, while her research contributions include publications in SCOPUS and UGC Care journals on topics such as digital transformation, consumer behaviour, IoT, and cybersecurity. A passionate advocate for global learning, Dr. Banerjee has led multiple student immersion programs across Singapore, France, and the UAE. Whether mentoring students or driving institutional initiatives, Dr. Banerjee thrives at the intersection of education, innovation, and impact.

entries.text: Dr. Suman Devadula Dean - School of Design Department of Design Department of Visual Arts Dr. Suman Devadula, is a passionate advocate of design-led innovation and its role in advancing sustainability across institutions. With over thirteen years of distinguished experience in the design industry and academia, Dr. Devadula brings exceptional expertise in integrating technology, research, and sustainability by design. Prior to joining MIT-WPU in this stint, Dr. Devadula served as Associate Professor, and in leadership positions like Head of Design and Dep. Director at JAIN School of Design, Media and Creative Arts, Bengaluru and also as Research Co-ordinator for Faculty of Creativity and Design. He led curriculum design, program management, and Outcome-Based Education (OBE) initiatives across several UG, PG and PhD programmes. Earlier to this, he served as the founding Head of School at MIT-WPU School of Design, Pune during 2018-2022. His corporate experience includes working as an Industrial Designer at John Deere Technology Centre India, where he managed global design and engineering projects across the U.S., Europe, and Asia. Prof. Devadula holds a Ph.D. in Sustainability by Design from IISc Bangalore, an M.Des. in Product Design from the Department of Design and Manufacturing (formerly CPDM), IISc Bangalore, a B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering from JNTU Hyderabad, and a Post

entries.excerpt: Dr. Suman Rawat is serving as an Assistant Professor in the Department of Wellness and Yogic Science at the School of Health Sciences and Technology, MIT-WPU. She is passionate about promoting holistic health and wellness through yoga education and…
entries.text: Dr. Suman Rawat Assistant Professor Department of Wellness and Yogic Science Dr. Suman Rawat is serving as an Assistant Professor in the Department of Wellness and Yogic Science at the School of Health Sciences and Technology, MIT-WPU. She is passionate about promoting holistic health and wellness through yoga education and practices. With experience in teaching yogic philosophy and therapeutic applications of yoga, she brings both academic depth and practical insight to her role. Dr. Rawat holds a Ph.D. in Yoga from Shoolini University and has qualified for the UGC-NET (Yoga). Her academic qualifications also include an M.Sc. in Yoga Therapy from Manipal Academy of Higher Education (MAHE) and a B.Sc. in Yoga Science from Morarji Desai National Institute of Yoga (MDNIY). She has also published research papers in the field of yoga and wellness. Before joining MIT-WPU, she was the Academic and NAAC Co-ordinator at Shoolini University.

Her area of research includes Self-organized Wireless Sensor Networks, Computer Networks, Information and Network Security, Wireless Sensor Networks and Internet of Things, She has over 33 years of experience in academic teaching and 20 years of research. She received Bachelors of Computer Science of Engineering from Govt. College of Engineering, Aurangabad-India in 1992, ME Computer Engineering from Govt. College of Engineering, Pune University, India in 2001 and PhD from Amravati University-India in 2019. She is a fellow member of IET and IETE. Handled projects that include Automated Robot using AI and ML for Healthcare, Network Security, and Cyber Physical Systems . She has published over 60 papers in reputed international conferences and journals. She has also published a book on Network Security and Fundamentals. She joined the MIT group of institutions in 1995. She has worked in other organizations like Amrutvahini College of Engineering, Sangamner and others. MIT-WPU / Faculty / Dr. Summon Kaul Faculty Dr. Summon Kaul Dr. Summon Koul holds a Master's degree in Organic Chemistry from the University of Kashmir (1998) and a PhD from the University of Jammu (2003). During her doctoral research, she focused on isolating, characterizing, and semisynthetic conversions of biologically active natural products. Faculty Faculty Professor Bio Dr. Summon Koul holds a Master's degree in Organic Chemistry from the University of Kashmir (1998) and a PhD from the University of Jammu (2003). During her doctoral research, she focused on isolating, characterizing, and semisynthetic conversions of biologically active natural products. After completing her PhD, she worked as a Research Associate at the Indian Institute of Science in Bengaluru, followed by a Postdoctoral Fellowship at Simon Fraser University in British Columbia, Canada, where she worked on the total synthesis of Triquinacenes. For 13 years, Summon worked as a drug discovery Scientist and program leader at Advinus Therapeutics - a TATA Enterprise. In this role, she led in-house and collaborative drug discovery research projects with reputed multinational pharma companies such as Merck, Johnson and Johnson, USA, and Takeda, Japan. She has handled multi-crore projects and has been recognized for Best Awards in the Company. Her focus areas were Cardiovascular Diseases, Metabolic Disorders, and Inflammation. entries.text: Dr. Sunil Brijlal Somani Associate Professor Department of Electrical and Electronics Engineering Mobile Communication, Wireless Communication, Computer Networks,IoT... Wireless Communication, IOT Dr. Sunil Somani is an Associate Professor and M.Tech. Coordinator in the School of Electronics & Communication Engineering, VLSI & Embedded System Specialization, MITWPU. He received his Bachelor's degree in Electronics Engineering from Marathwada University in 1993, followed by an M.Tech. in Electronics & Telecommunication from Govt. College of Engineering Pune, and a Doctor of Philosophy in Electronics & Communication. Dr. Somani has over 25 years of teaching experience and has served as an Assistant Professor at A C Patil College of Engineering, Navi Mumbai, prior to joining MIT Group of Institutions. He is a Fellow of IETE, Member of IE, Life member of ISTE, and Senior member of IEEE. His research interests lie in the fields of Wireless Communication, Digital Communication, Computer networks, IoT, and Signal processing. He has authored over 42 research papers in international and national-level journals and has reviewed conference papers in the field of communication engineering, Wireless communication, wireless networks, and converging telecom technologies. Dr. Somani has filed and published one patent and a copyright in the VLSI domain. Dr. Somani has supervised over 40 Master'

entries.title: Dr. Supriya Paigude
entries.excerpt: Dr. Supriya Paigude is a seasoned academic and HR professional with over 20 years of experience spanning academia, executive search, and industry-academia collaborations. She holds a Ph.D. in Management and multiple master’s degrees in HR and business…
entries.text: Dr. Supriya Paigude Assistant Professor Department of Business Dr. Supriya Paigude is a seasoned academic and HR professional with over 20 years of experience spanning academia, executive search, and industry-academia collaborations. She holds a Ph.D. in Management and multiple master’s degrees in HR and business systems from Pune University. At MIT-WPU, she teaches HR-focused courses such as Organizational Behavior, Strategic HRM, HR Analytics, and Corporate Governance. She has held leadership roles as Assistant Director – Industry Partnerships and currently serves on the NAAC Committee and as a Placement Representative. Her research focuses on AI in HRM, work-life balance, digital transformation, and sustainability. She has published in reputed journals such as the South Eastern European Journal of Public Health and presented at conferences organized by EDII, IMT Nagpur, and ICFAI Business School. She has also coordinated impactful CSR initiatives and live industry projects with firms like Piaggio and Jendamark India.

entries.title: Dr. Surendra Hawgirao Barhatte
entries.excerpt: It seems like Dr. Barhatte has had a long and varied career at MIT-WPU. He began as a lecturer in 2007, bringing with him a decade of industry experience. Over the years, he has taken on several roles within the Mechanical Engineering department, including…
entries.text: Dr. Surendra Hawgirao Barhatte Assistant Professor Department of Mechanical Engineering It seems like Dr. Barhatte has had a long and varied career at MIT-WPU. He began as a lecturer in 2007, bringing with him a decade of industry experience. Over the years, he has taken on several roles within the Mechanical Engineering department, including academic coordinator, senior supervisor, exam coordinator, and industrial visits in-charge. He has also served as the CEEP coordinator at the institute level and has been a part of the Grievance Cell. Currently, Dr. Barhatte holds the position of Assistant Professor in Mechanical Engineering and serves as the faculty advisor for Team-Prokarters. He is also a member of the Admissions committee of the department. It seems like he has been actively involved in various aspects of the institute's functioning and has contributed significantly to its growth and development over the years.

entries.title: Dr. Sushil Kumar Gupta
entries.excerpt: Dr. Sushil Kumar Gupta brings over 21 years of distinguished experience, equally divided between corporate leadership and academic excellence. A UGC-NET qualified professional in Management (June 2012), he holds a Ph.D. in Management from Amity University,…
entries.text: Dr. Sushil Kumar Gupta Associate Professor Department of Commerce & Accounting Dr. Sushil Kumar Gupta brings over 21 years of distinguished experience, equally divided between corporate leadership and academic excellence. A UGC-NET qualified professional in Management (June 2012), he holds a Ph.D. in Management from Amity University, Uttar Pradesh, and is an alumnus of IIM Ahmedabad, having completed the prestigious 43rd Faculty Development Programme in Pedagogy and Research Methods (April–May 2023). His academic portfolio includes 12 Scopus-indexed publications and 9 ABDC-listed papers (2 in category B and 7 in category C), alongside five patents in the domains of finance and behavioural analytics. He is also a recipient of a research grant from IIM Ahmedabad, further reinforcing his scholarly engagement. His research focuses on contemporary trends in finance, fintech, wealth management etc. He has been honoured with the Outstanding Educator Award 2025 by Lexicon Group of Institutions and the Global Teacher Award 2021 by AKS Education. In the corporate domain, Dr. Gupta has held senior leadership roles, including Assistant Vice President positions at reputed organizations such as Motilal Oswal Purple Client Group, BRICS Securities, and ICICI AMC. He is a SEBI-certified Authorized Resource Person (Trainer) and actively contributed to financial literacy initiatives until May 202

entries.text: Dr. Sushila Manish Palwe Assistant Professor Department of Computer Science and Engineering Computer Vision, Machine Learning, Databases With over 19 years of experience in Academics and Teaching, Dr. Sushila Palwe specializes in teaching Databases, Machine Learning, Data Science, Data Mining, and Business Intelligence. She has developed innovative teaching methodologies to enhance the learning process, benefiting numerous students. Dr. Palwe has received grants for research projects and international workshops from SPPU BUCD. She has mentored and guided undergraduate and post-graduate students as well as PhD candidates, with over 55 research publications and book chapters to her credit. She has authored three books and organized several seminars, workshops, and FDPs. Dr. Palwe has also played a leading role in academic responsibilities, such as NAAC Criteria-1, NBA Criteria-II, ISO, and Infosys Campus Connect Program InCharge, among others. Dr. Palwe currently serves as the B Tech CSE(AI-DS) Programmer Coordinator and is involved in overall curriculum development for B Tech CSE(AI-DS). Dr. Palwe has also contributed to various consultancy projects sponsored by companies such as Blackberry, Whirlpool, and Idiada.

entries.title: Dr. Sushma Verma
entries.excerpt: Dr. Sushma Verma is currently serving as an Associate Professor at the School of Business, Dr. Vishwanath Karad MIT World Peace University, Pune. She is an accomplished academician and result-oriented professional with over 17 years of experience in…
entries.text: Dr. Sushma Verma Associate Professor Department of Business Dr. Sushma Verma is currently serving as an Associate Professor at the School of Business, Dr. Vishwanath Karad MIT World Peace University, Pune. She is an accomplished academician and result-oriented professional with over 17 years of experience in teaching and research. She has an extensive publication record in reputed ABDC, Scopus, and Web of Science– indexed journals, including International Review of Economics and Finance, European Management Journal, Management Review Quarterly, and Benchmarking, among others. She has also presented her research at prestigious international conferences and has received several Best Paper Awards. Dr. Verma is the author of books on Advanced Financial Management, Management Accounting and Financial Risk Management. Her research interests span multiple dimensions of corporate finance, with a strong emphasis on sustainability-related issues. An avid researcher, she takes keen interests in contemporary issues. In addition, she actively contributes to the academic and research community as an Associate Editor of MUDRA, published by Journal Press India. Passionate about academic excellence and research capacity building, she has also contributed as a resource person for several Faculty Development Programmes (FDPs).

entries.title: Dr. Sushrut Hemant Vinchurkar
entries.excerpt: Dr. Sushrut H. Vinchurkar is an Assistant Professor in the Department of Civil Engineering at Dr. Vishwanath Karad MIT World Peace University, Pune. He received his Doctorate in Philosophy with specialization in Water Resources Engineering from Sardar…
entries.text: Dr. Sushrut Hemant Vinchurkar Assistant Professor Department of Civil Engineering Dr. Sushrut H. Vinchurkar is an Assistant Professor in the Department of Civil Engineering at Dr. Vishwanath Karad MIT World Peace University, Pune. He received his Doctorate in Philosophy with specialization in Water Resources Engineering from Sardar Vallabhbhai National Institute of Technology, Surat. With an overall experience of 8 years, including 4 years in academics and 4 years in research, Dr. Vinchurkar has published 4 research papers in international journals and presented over 15 articles at various national and international conferences. In his free time, he enjoys writing blogs on case-studies related to the field of Water Resources Engineering. Dr. Vinchurkar has a strong interest in Fluid Mechanics, Open Channel Flow, Hydrology and Water Resources Engineering, and Design of Hydraulic Structures, which is evident from his academic and research background. His expertise in these areas makes him a valuable asset to the Department l of Civil Engineering.

entries.title: Dr. Swapnil Narayan Undale
entries.excerpt: Marketing, Sales, Use of technology in sales & marketing. Diffusion of Technology, Educational Technology.
entries.text: Dr. Swapnil Narayan Undale Associate Professor Department of Business Marketing, Sales, Use of technology in sales & marketing. Diffusion of Technology, Educational Technology. Dr. Swapnil Undale is a seasoned academician and accomplished industry professional with over 20 years of diverse experience in Sales and Marketing across Institutional, Industrial, and Pharmaceutical sectors. Throughout his career, he has served renowned multinational companies such as L&T, ESAB, and SKF through their channel partners, and served as a Regional Sales Manager at FDC Ltd. His core areas of expertise and research include Sales & Marketing, Marketing Research and the use of technology in sales and marketing, Pharmaceutical Marketing. He has a keen interest in how emerging digital tools and platforms are transforming marketing practices, sales processes, and customer engagement strategies. An active contributor to academia and industry, he regularly conducts workshops on marketing research and advanced research methodologies using tools such as SPSS, AMOS, Python, and R. He is the author of a book titled Business Research Methods and has published several high-quality research papers in reputed journals. His work reflects a deep understanding of both traditional marketing principles and the evolving role of technology in shaping modern marketing strategies.

entries.excerpt: Dr. Swati Jagdale is a highly accomplished academic and researcher in the field of pharmaceutics. She earned her B. Pharm. (1998), M. Pharm. (2000) from Pune University, and Ph.D. (2009) from Shivaji University Kolhapur. Currently, she holds the…
entries.text: Dr. Swati Changdeo Jagdale Professor Department of Pharmaceutical Sciences Dr. Swati Jagdale is a highly accomplished academic and researcher in the field of pharmaceutics. She earned her B. Pharm. (1998), M. Pharm. (2000) from Pune University, and Ph.D. (2009) from Shivaji University Kolhapur. Currently, she holds the prestigious position of Professor in the Department of Pharmaceutics at the School of Health Sciences and Technology in Pune. Dr. Jagdale's significant contributions to the field of pharmaceutics are widely recognized, with more than 100 research articles published in reputed national and international journals, along with five authored books and more than ten book chapters. She holds two Indian patents and two patents from the Republic of South Africa, with an additional four Indian patents currently in process. She has also received funding for her research projects from the Council of Scientific and Industrial Research (CSIR) (Amount 21.36 Lakh) and AICTE-MODROB grant (Rs. 17.22 Lacs), in addition to completing two minor research projects at Savitribai Phule Pune University (4.9 Lakhs). As an experienced guide, Dr. Jagdale has successfully mentored 80 M. Pharm. students and 06 Ph.D. students, with three M. Certified by the Department of Science and Technology (DST), Government of India, she is an accredited trainer for Entrepreneurship Development. entries.title: Dr. Tanya Kumar
entries.excerpt: Dr. Tanya Kumar is an Assistant Professor at the School of Business, MIT World Peace University, where she is recognized for her dynamic teaching approach and strong research orientation. With over four years of academic experience in marketing and…
entries.text: Dr. Tanya Kumar Assistant Professor Department of Business Dr. Tanya Kumar is an Assistant Professor at the School of Business, MIT World Peace University, where she is recognized for her dynamic teaching approach and strong research orientation. With over four years of academic experience in marketing and finance, she brings conceptual clarity, industry relevance, and learner-centric pedagogy into the classroom. Her teaching interests span Marketing Management, Strategic Management, and Consumer Behaviour, with a focus on developing analytical thinking and practical decision-making skills among students. Beyond teaching, she plays an active role in academic administration and institutional development, contributing to curriculum design, NAAC documentation, and the coordination of Faculty Development Programmes (FDPs). She is a prolific researcher with publications in reputed Scopus-, Web of Science-, and ABDC-listed journals, and has authored several international book chapters with globally renowned publishers including IGI Global, Emerald, Routledge, and Wiley. Driven by a passion for academic excellence, leadership, and innovation, Dr. Tanya is committed to advancing impactful research and nurturing future-ready management professionals through quality education and scholarly engagement.

She earned her M.Tech degree from PSG Tech College of Engineering, Coimbatore in 2008 and received her… MIT-WPU / Faculty / Dr. Uma R. Pujeri Faculty Dr. Uma R. Pujeri MIT-WPU Faculty Faculty Associate Professor Bio Dr. Uma R Pujeri was born in Sangli, India in 1981. She earned her M.Tech degree from PSG Tech College of Engineering, Coimbatore in 2008 and received her doctorate degree from Anna University, Chennai in May 2017. Her research area focuses on computer network congestion control algorithms. With fourteen years of teaching experience, she has worked as an Assistant Professor at Adithya College of Engineering, Coimbatore for six years and is currently serving as an Associate Professor at Dr. Vishwanath Karad MIT World Peace University, Pune, Maharashtra. Dr. Pujeri is a Life Member of the Indian Society for Technical Education (ISTE) and has conducted several workshops, FDPs, and conferences. Her post-doctoral fellowship from Srinivas University, Mangalore, under the guidance of Dr. P.S. Aitthal, is registered under the ID 20SUPDROO9. Dr. Pujeri has published 40 research papers in international journals, and her PhD thesis is available on the UGC website https://shodhganga.inflibnet.ac.in/handle/10603/196148. Contact her at uma.pujeri@mitwpu.edu.in. Research Areas Computer Networks, Cryptography, loud computing, encryption algorithm, Post Quantum Lattice algorithm Dr. Uma R. entries.text: Dr. Umesh Kisan Raut Associate Professor Department of Computer Science and Engineering Dr. Umesh Raut is an Associate Professor in the Department of Computer Science and Engineering at MIT-WPU, with over 23 years of teaching experience. His teaching philosophy centers on student-centric, outcome-based learning that combines strong theoretical foundations with practical and research-oriented exposure. Motivated by a commitment to academic excellence and innovation, he engages students across UG, PG, and Ph.D. programs through mentoring and research guidance. As a recognized Ph.D. supervisor and researcher with publications, design patents, and a co-authored textbook, he actively contributes to research and innovation in computer engineering. He is actively involved in extracurricular and institutional activities and serves as the Coordinator of the National Academic Immersion Program (NAIP), collaborating with institutions such as IITs and NITs, and aligning his efforts with MIT-WPU’s vision of excellence, holistic development, and societal impact.

Lenin Kumar is a distinguished faculty member at the MIT School of Government, where he guides undergraduate and postgraduate students in understanding political processes, international affairs, and India’s global engagements. He completed his Masters, M.Phil., and Ph.D. at the School of International Studies, Jawaharlal Nehru University, earning his doctorate in 2017 with a thesis titled “Political Economy of Neoliberal Reforms in Estonia, 1991–2014.” Dr. Lenin Kumar specializes in Indian politics, India’s foreign policy, and global politics. He has published extensively in scholarly journals, examining topics such as India–Nepal relations (From Blockade to Demonetisation, Stosunki Międzynarodowe), democratic transition in Estonia, India’s strategic autonomy in South Asia (Journal of the Indian Ocean Region), and India-Baltic states relations (IUP Journal of International Relations). entries.text: Dr. V N V Rama Sastry Associate Professor Department of Business He currently serves as Associate Professor at the School of Business, MIT-WPU, Pune, India. He has held prior academic positions at Texas A&M University and University of Wisconsin–Eau Claire among other institutions. His teaching portfolio includes a broad spectrum of finance courses including Corporate Finance, Investment Banking, Fixed Income Securities, International Finance, and Commercial Bank Management. His current research interests lie in Corporate Governance and Corporate Social Responsibility. His published work appears in peer-reviewed journals such as International Journal of Social Economics, Corporate Ownership and Control, Research in Finance, Corporate Governance and Sustainability Review. Several of his publications are indexed in Scopus and ranked in ABDC Journal categories.

entries.text: Dr. Vaibhav Narendra Deshmukh Associate Professor Department of Mechanical Engineering Nanofluid Heat Transfer, Adsorption Technology, Battery Thermal Management System, Biofuels, Electronic Devices Cooling, Renewable and Sustainable Energy Dr. Vaibhav Narendra Deshmukh is a senior academician with a total of 21 years of experience, including 1.5 years in industry and 12 years at MIT. He completed his Ph.D. in Mechanical Engineering from Savitribai Phule Pune University in 2018. He has published ten papers and has one granted and one published Indian patent. Dr. Deshmukh has also guided ten M.Tech. dissertations and is currently guiding three PhD scholars. He is known for his expertise in the field of mechanical engineering and his passion for teaching and research.

Their doctoral research focused on image fusion using image processing-based algorithms, and they have developed their own algorithm for image fusion. They have published a book on Image Fusion and a book chapter on image fusion, demonstrating their expertise in this area. Dr. Deshmukh is actively involved in curriculum development, delivering effective lectures, achieving course outcomes, and managing projects. They possess strong administrative, leadership, and communication skills, and their administrative responsibilities involve communicating with SY B Tech students regarding their course enrollment, conducting student orientation, registering students in the ERP system, monitoring their progress, and providing mentorship. With research publications in Scopus/WoS indexed international journals and conferences, Dr. Deshmukh has also worked on various projects related to image fusion, emotion detection, disease detection, object detection, and more. entries.excerpt: Psychology, Mental health Publications Positivity at Work-Place: A Comparative Investigation & An Inevitable Work-Place Conflict: An Overview Google Scholar link: Google Scholar
entries.text: Dr. Vaishali Namdevrao Choudhari Assistant Professor Department of Liberal Arts Psychology, Mental health Publications Positivity at Work-Place: A Comparative Investigation & An Inevitable Work-Place Conflict: An Overview Google Scholar link: Google Scholar Dr. Vaishali Choudhari is a scholar with UGC NET and PhD in Psychology. Her research interests include workplace conflict, positive psychology, mental health, and gender differences. She has authored several articles in reputed journals such as the Indian Journal of Psychology and Education, International Journal of Indian Psychology, and Indian Journal of Natural Sciences. Dr. Choudhari's work includes a systematic review of prenatal mental health in India, a comparative investigation of personality traits and gender differences among management students, and a study on haptic memory in deaf adolescents. She is a dedicated researcher and has made significant contributions to the field of psychology.

Dr. Vanisree Ramanathan, Ph.D., Associate Professor at MIT World Peace University located in Pune. With an illustrious career spanning 19 years, she has made significant contributions in the fields of Sociology, Public Policy, Public Health, and Law. Dr. Vanisree has held full-time faculty positions at prestigious institutions including Symbiosis Law School, MIT School of Government in Pune, and Chinmaya Vishwavidyappeth in Cochin.Her expertise encompasses a wide array of interdisciplinary subjects including Public Health, Health Policy, Heal care laws Gender Studies, Education, sustainable Development, Good Governance, and Social Philosophy. entries.text: Dr. Varsha Shriram Nerlekar Associate Professor Department of Business Sustainability/ Public Finance/ Financial Technologies/ Behavioural Finance & Investments Dr. Varsha Nerlekar is an Associate Professor in Finance at the School of Management (PG) MIT World Peace University in Pune, India. With over 20 years of teaching and industry experience, her research interests include Sustainability, Public Finance, Financial Technologies, Behavioural Finance, and Investments. She received her Ph.D. in Management from Nagpur University, and her postgraduate degree from Indira Institute of Management, Pune. Dr. Nerlekar has published more than 20 research papers and case studies in national and international journals, and is a member of the Board of Studies for reputed institutes such as Symbiosis College of Commerce. She has also conducted Faculty Development Programs and Management Development Programs for various institutions.

Dr. Vasi Shaikh is a highly experienced academician and researcher with over 30 years of teaching and research experience in various science and engineering institutes and universities in India. Over the last few years, Dr. Shaikh played a key role in the successful implementation of a new PG program at the university from its conceptualization to its launch, all while maintaining high academic standards and growing revenue. Dr. Shaikh has headed the M.Sc. Industrial Polymer Chemistry program, which has an enrollment of about 60 students. Dr. Shaikh has built a reputation for consistently attracting good admissions and placements. In this role, Dr. Shaikh has implemented several innovative practices that have improved the quality of education and the employability of students. Dr. Shaikh's other achievements include one year of industrial working experience with Asian Paints India Ltd., being a JRF & SRF on DST funded research project, receiving Young Scientist research funding from SERC-DST, New Delhi, being a recognized Ph.D. guide in both chemistry and chemical engineering, and being a member of the BoS and faculty of chemical engineering and chemistry. She completed her Ph.D. in Finance and an MBA in Finance from Savitribai Phule Pune University. At WPU-SOB, she teaches courses such as Corporate Finance, Financial Modeling, and Corporate Valuation. Her research interests include Microfinance, Financial Inclusion, and Corporate Finance. With her expertise in these areas, she has contributed to multiple research publications and conference presentations. Dr. Vedashree has also participated in various workshops, seminars, and training programs related to Finance and Financial Modeling.

entries.text: Dr. Vibha Utpal Patel Assistant Professor Department of Electrical and Electronics Engineering wireless communication, Digital communication, Neural Networks, Machine Learning, Data Science, Electromagnetics and Antennas, and Digital signal processing. Dr. Vibha Patel received her Ph.D. in Electronics & Communication from Gujarat Technological University in 2023. With over 12 years of teaching experience, she has made notable contributions to her field. Her research interests span wireless communication, digital communication, neural networks, machine learning, data science, electromagnetics and antennas, and digital signal processing. Dr. Patel's work has resulted in the grant of one Australian patent and one South African patent in her name. She has worked on various noteworthy projects, such as the TDMA-based data logger for AWS, moisture sensor using patch antenna, clustering analysis on world health data, and job recommender system, among others.

entries.title: Dr. Vijay Kumar Kalyani
entries.excerpt: Neural networks, physics-informed neural networks, mathematical modelling, and mathematical seismology.
entries.text: Dr. Vijay Kumar Kalyani Professor of Practice Department of Mathematics and Statistics Neural networks, physics-informed neural networks, mathematical modelling, and mathematical seismology. Dr. Vijay Kumar Kalyani is currently serving as Professor of Practice at Dr. Vishwanath Karad MIT World Peace University, Pune. He is a distinguished mathematician and computational scientist with over 35 years of experience in teaching and research. He obtained his Ph.D. in Applied Mathematics from the Indian School of Mines (IIT), Dhanbad, in 1988. He also earned an M.Phil. with a Gold Medal and an M.Tech. by research in Computer Applications. His research focuses on Artificial Neural Networks, Physics-Informed Neural Networks, mathematical modelling, and seismic wave propagation. He has served in senior scientific positions at CSIR-CIMFR, Dhanbad, including Chief Scientist (Scientist-G). He has supervised Ph.D. and postgraduate theses and taught B.Tech. and M.Tech. students. He has published more than 25 research papers in SCI, Scopus, and international journals. His work includes numerical simulation, deep learning, and computational geophysics. He continues to contribute actively to advanced research and education in applied mathematics and neural networks.

entries.title: Dr. Vijayapandi Pandy
entries.excerpt: Dr. Vijayapandi Pandy is an Associate Professor in the Department of Pharmaceutical Sciences at the School of Health Sciences & Technology, MIT World Peace University, Pune, Maharashtra, India. He obtained his B. Pharm degree with first-class honors in…
entries.text: Dr. Vijayapandi Pandy Associate Professor Department of Pharmaceutical Sciences Dr. Vijayapandi Pandy is an Associate Professor in the Department of Pharmaceutical Sciences at the School of Health Sciences & Technology, MIT World Peace University, Pune, Maharashtra, India. He obtained his B. Pharm degree with first-class honors in 1997 and completed his M. Pharm in Pharmacology in 2000, securing the first rank at SCS College of Pharmacy, Harapanahalli, Karnataka. He earned his Ph.D. in Psychopharmacology from the prestigious Birla Institute of Technology and Science (BITS), Pilani. Dr. Pandy’s research primarily focuses on the psychopharmacological evaluation of psychoactive natural substances for the discovery of novel therapeutic agents to treat substance use disorders, employing validated animal models. He is a life member of several professional bodies, including the Tamil Nadu Pharmacy Council, the Indian Pharmacological Society, the Laboratory Animal Scientist’s Association (LASA, India), the Association of Pharmaceutical Teachers of India (APTI), the Antiviral Research Society (AVRS), and the Indian Pharmacy Graduate Association. With more than 25 years of teaching and research experience across India, Malaysia, Libya, and Ethiopia, Dr. Pandy has authored 76 research and review articles in peer-reviewed journals and contributed two book chapters. entries.text: Dr. Vijaykumar Bilolikar Professor Department of Business Prof Bilolikar has a rich academic and administrative experience of 28 years and is a professor of Operations Management at MIT-WPU. He has handled various administrative responsibilities such as Dean of Student Affairs, Controller of examination, NBA coordinator etc. He holds a Bachelors in Production Engineering from Government College of Engineering and a Masters in manufacturing engineering. He holds a doctoral degree from Indian Institute of Technology Bombay in the area of operations management. His papers have been published in reputed international conferences and journals including International Journal of Production Research, Benchmarking an International Journal, International Journal of Logistics and Management, Annals of operations research etc. He is on the reviewer board of various journals. His research interests include supply chain management, application of AI techniques to operations and project management, simulation of manufacturing systems, sustainable manufacturing and Industry 4.0 architecture.

He is also qualified NET(UGC) and SET (Maharashtra) exam. He has 11 years of experience teaching MCA, M.Sc.(CS), BCA, B.Sc(CS) students. He is a faculty member of the Department of Computer Science MIT-WPU, Pune. His fields of research interest include Fuzzy logic, Artificial Intelligence, Algorithm Design Strategy, data structure, etc. He has published 12 research papers in various international journals and conference proceedings. He has attended many conferences, workshops, and seminars.

entries.excerpt: Political Sociology, Social Exclusion/Marginalization and Politics of Recognition, Inclusion and Justice; Development Sociology, Critical Phenomenology; Critical Caste Studies; and Sociology of Caste, Tribe and Inter-subjectivity with special reference to…
entries.text: Dr. Vikas Keshav Jadhav Assistant Professor Department of Liberal Arts Political Sociology, Social Exclusion/Marginalization and Politics of Recognition, Inclusion and Justice; Development Sociology, Critical Phenomenology; Critical Caste Studies; and Sociology of Caste, Tribe and Inter-subjectivity with special reference to Dalit, Adivasis and De-notified and Nomadic Tribes of India. Dr. Vikas is a Ph.D. in Sociology from the Centre for the Study of Social Systems, Jawaharlal Nehru University, New Delhi. He is also a trained development sector professional from Tata Institute of Social Sciences, Mumbai, having an experience of field as well as working with Public Sector Unit – NTPC Limited. He employs an interdisciplinary approach and mixed- method framework to study the politics of marginalization in India. His work engages in examining the social, political and historical factors that accentuate the processes of alterity construction, stigmatization, exclusion, and how different social groups negotiate and counter diverse structural constraints.

entries.excerpt: Dr. Vikram Shete is an accomplished entrepreneur, mentor, and educator with over 15 years of experience fostering innovation and building entrepreneurial ecosystems. As an Associate Professor of Entrepreneurship at MIT World Peace University and a mentor…
entries.text: Dr. Vikram Shete Associate Professor Department of Business Dr. Vikram Shete is an accomplished entrepreneur, mentor, and educator with over 15 years of experience fostering innovation and building entrepreneurial ecosystems. As an Associate Professor of Entrepreneurship at MIT World Peace University and a mentor with premier institutions like Stanford Seed, Atal Incubation Centre, and BITS Pilani, he has empowered hundreds of aspiring founders. His flagship course, Entrepreneurship Blueprint, has enabled students to launch viable startups, some of which have secured incubation offers. Driven by a mission to nurture the next generation of entrepreneurs, Dr. Shete blends academic rigor with real-world startup insights to deliver transformative learning experiences.

Dr. Gaikwad actively fosters a culture of open communication and intellectual growth, mentoring students and faculty alike. His focus on developing research-oriented environments and promoting industry–institute partnerships has helped nurture an undergraduate research culture and strengthen practical learning outcomes. entries.text: Dr. Vilas Sahebrao Kanthale Associate Professor Department of Mechanical Engineering Design, Vibration and Manufacturing Dr. Vilas Sahebrao Kanthale is an experienced educator and administrator with 27 years of professional experience, including 25 years of teaching and 2 years of industry experience. He holds a PhD from COEP, Pune and has a strong record in both teaching and administration. He is currently serving as the Chief Examination Officer for the Faculty of Engineering and Technology. Prof. Kanthale has guided numerous B.Tech and M.Tech project students, as well as PhD research scholars. His expertise includes the subjects of EGR, SOM, TOM, DME-I, II, MSD, and DOM.

entries.department: Department of Electrical and Electronics Engineering
entries.excerpt: : IoT, Computer Vision, Edge Intelligence, Embedded System
entries.text: Dr. Vinaya Vijay Gohokar Professor Department of Electrical and Electronics Engineering : IoT, Computer Vision, Edge Intelligence, Embedded System With over 30 years of experience in teaching and research in Electronics and Communication Engineering, Dr. Vinaya Gohokar is a highly accomplished academician. She completed her graduation in Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering from S.G.B. Amravati University in 1991, and went on to obtain an M.S. in Electronics and Control from B.I.T.S, Pilani. She received her Ph.D. in Electronics Engineering from Amravati University in 2009. Dr. Gohokar has published over 60 research papers in international journals and conferences, showcasing her expertise in various areas of electronics and communication engineering. Her research interests include IoT, computer vision, and signal processing, and she has successfully guided 6 Ph.D. scholars in these domains. Dr. Gohokar's contribution to the field has been recognized by several funding agencies, including DST and AICTE, with grants worth 60 lakhs to her credit. Her passion for research and teaching has made her a respected figure in the academic community, and she continues to inspire the next generation of engineers and researchers.

entries.text: Dr. Vinita Kale Associate Professor Department of Business Dr. Vinita holds a PhD in Finance and is a SEBI-certified Resource Person for financial literacy, with extensive experience in conducting training programs. As a certified Entrepreneurship Mentor by NIESBUD, Govt. of India, her expertise spans Entrepreneurship Development, Startups, Risk Management, Accounting for Business Decisions, Banking, and Project Finance. She has presented research at premier institutions like IIM Calcutta, IIM Ahmedabad, and IITs, and has published Scopus-indexed papers in finance and entrepreneurship. With a strong passion for academia and entrepreneurship, she has organized workshops in collaboration with IIMs, IIT Bombay, and government bodies like EDII and DIC. A dynamic trainer, mentor, and consultant, she is dedicated to fostering financial literacy and incubating entrepreneurs, blending finance and entrepreneurship to drive impactful learning and innovation.

He has obtained a doctorate in Sociology and Social Anthropology from Central European University, Vienna, Austria. His research areas include Migration and Diaspora, Social Exclusion, Anthropology of Caste, Religion, Globalisation, and Social Movements in India and the Globe. Dr Vinod has an MPhil in Sociology from Jawaharlal Nehru University, New Delhi and an MA in Social Work from Tata Institute of Social Sciences, Mumbai. He is qualified the NET-JRF in Sociology. Faculty Faculty Dr. Vinod Shastri - faculty At MIT-WPU, Pune Professor Bio Dr. Vinod Shastri has 40 years of diverse experience spanning entrepreneurship, entrepreneurship education, administration, training, teaching, finance, and production, but he is essentially an entrepreneurship educator at heart. Prior to joining MIT-WPU, he served as Dean of Student Affairs and Head of the Centre for Innovation & Entrepreneurship (CIE) at Bennett University, and earlier as Deputy Director at Symbiosis. He successfully built an entrepreneurial culture at both universities. From co-founding a unique start-up to co-authoring the Global Entrepreneurship Monitor (GEM) Report, he belongs to the rare breed of educators who practice what they preach and is widely acknowledged as a culture builder par excellence.

entries.text: Dr. Waseem Khan Assistant Professor Department of Business Dr. Waseem Khan is currently working as an Assistant Professor in the School of Business at Dr. Vishwanath Karad MIT World Peace University, Pune. He has over six years of diverse experience across academia, research, and industry, having been associated with reputed institutions such as Aligarh Muslim University, Jamia Hamdard, GLA University (Mathura), and the Indian Institute of Management, Lucknow, as well as with ICICI Bank Ltd. He holds a master’s degree and a Ph.D. in Agricultural Economics and Business Management from Aligarh Muslim University and is also qualified in the ASRB-NET in both Agricultural Business Management and Agricultural Economics. His teaching and research interests includes Agricultural and Food Marketing, Agricultural Economics, Research in Agribusiness, Business Statistics, Managerial Economics, Entrepreneurship, and Consumer Behaviour. Dr. Khan has successfully completed a research project funded by the Indian Council of Social Science Research (ICSSR) as Co-Project Director and is currently serving in the same role for a Collaborative Research Project under "Vision Viksit Bharat@2047." Dr. Khan has published more than 50 research papers in leading international journals such as Energy for Sustainable Development (Elsevier), British Food Journal (Emerald), Economic and Political Weekly (EPW

Kulkarni serves as an Assistant Professor at SCET, MIT World Peace University College of Engineering and brings over 18 years of rich teaching… MIT-WPU / Faculty / Dr. Yogesh R. Kulkarni Faculty Dr. Yogesh R. Kulkarni MIT-WPU Faculty Faculty Assistant Professor Bio Dr. Yogesh R. Kulkarni serves as an Assistant Professor at SCET, MIT World Peace University College of Engineering and brings over 18 years of rich teaching experience in the field of engineering education. His primary research interests include Data Mining and Data Warehousing, areas in which he has made notable academic contributions. Dr. Kulkarni has published research papers indexed in Elsevier Scopus and several additional papers in reputed national and international journals and conferences. He is an active member of professional bodies and holds lifetime memberships in the Computer Society of India (CSI) and the Indian Society for Technical Education (ISTE). Known for his dedication and strong work ethic, Dr. Kulkarni has successfully guided more than ten undergraduate project groups, MTech students, PhD Scholar in process, supporting students in developing practical and research-oriented skills. In addition to his academic contributions, his effective administrative and organizational abilities enable him to efficiently manage teaching responsibilities and institutional academic activities. entries.title: Dr. Yogita Sachin Ozarde
entries.excerpt: Dr. Yogita Ozarde is an accomplished researcher and teacher with a total of 20 years of experience. She completed her B. Pharmacy and M. Pharmacy from Shivaji University, Kolhapur and her Ph.D from Savitribai Phule Pune University, Pune. Currently, she…
entries.text: Dr. Yogita Sachin Ozarde Assistant Professor Department of Pharmaceutical Sciences Dr. Yogita Ozarde is an accomplished researcher and teacher with a total of 20 years of experience. She completed her B. Pharmacy and M. Pharmacy from Shivaji University, Kolhapur and her Ph.D from Savitribai Phule Pune University, Pune. Currently, she serves as an Assistant Professor in Pharmaceutical Chemistry at MIT World Peace University, School of Health Science and Technology. Dr. Ozarde has supervised over 20 undergraduate students and 7 Postgraduate students, and has received research grants from BCUD, Savitribai Phule Pune University. Her research interests lie in the phytochemical and pharmacological evaluation of herbal plants, as well as the isolation and spectral analysis of phytoconstituents. She has presented her research work at national and international conferences and has multiple research publications to her credit.
